meta-description: Learn about preventive services by reviewing the definition in the HealthCare.gov Glossary.
title: Preventive services
excerpt: Routine health care that includes screenings, check-ups, and patient counseling to prevent illnesses, disease, or other health problems.
content:
Routine health care that includes screenings, check-ups, and patient counseling to prevent illnesses, disease, or other health problems.
